LightningComponentBundle.description: Real-time checklist monitoring for Voice Calls and Messaging Sessions with AI integration

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Title displayed in the card header. Leave blank to use checklist name.

property.name: showChecklistTitle
property.label: Use Checklist Name as Title
property.description: When enabled, displays the active checklist template name instead of Card Title

property.name: componentHeight
property.label: Component Height (px)
property.description: Height of the checklist area in pixels

property.name: darkMode
property.label: Dark Mode
property.description: Enable dark mode styling for the component

property.name: instructionFontSize
property.label: Instruction Font Size
property.description: Font size for checklist item instructions

property.name: allowPause
property.label: Allow Pause/Resume
property.description: Show the pause/resume button for monitoring

property.name: requireStartButton
property.label: Require Start Button
property.description: When enabled, agent must click Start to begin monitoring. When disabled, monitoring starts automatically.

property.name: trackCustomerSpeech
property.label: Include Customer Messages
property.description: When enabled, evaluates both agent AND customer speech/messages

property.name: batchWordThreshold
property.label: Word Batch Threshold
property.description: Number of words to accumulate before triggering AI evaluation. Applies to both voice transcripts and chat messages.

property.name: evaluatorFlowBaseName
property.label: AI Evaluator Flow Name
property.description: Base name for the AI evaluator flow (without _Flow suffix)

property.name: transcriptFlowName
property.label: [Voice] Transcript Flow Name
property.description: Voice only: Name of the flow that retrieves the full voice transcript

property.name: messagingPollInterval
property.label: [Messaging] Poll Interval (ms)
property.description: Messaging only: How often to check for new messages in milliseconds (e.g., 5000 = 5 seconds). Leave empty or set to 0 to disable auto-checking - agents will need to manually click 'Verify Now' button.

property.name: messagingTranscriptFlowName
property.label: [Messaging] Transcript Flow Name
property.description: Messaging only: Name of the flow that retrieves the conversation transcript
